name: Privy
description: Privy — Embedded wallet and authentication SDK for Web3 apps supporting social login, email, and multi-wallet connection.

seo.title: Privy — Identity / Auth / User Management
seo.meta_description: Privy: Privy — Embedded wallet and authentication SDK for Web3 apps supporting social login, email, and multi-wallet connection.

when_to_use: Embedded wallet creation via social login for Web3 apps
Email and SMS-based wallet provisioning for non-crypto users
Multi-wallet connection management across EVM chains
OIDC-compatible auth with on-chain identity for dApps
Mobile-first wallet SDK for React Native Web3 applications

pros: Embedded wallets with email, social and wallet login
Strong progressive onboarding for non-crypto users
Good SDK ergonomics and React hooks
Policy engine and MPC-based key management
cons: Pricing climbs fast with MAU growth
Embedded wallet export model has caveats
Less chain breadth than raw WalletConnect stacks
Some features gated behind higher tiers
review.verdict: Best-in-class UX for consumer Web3 apps that want Web2-like onboarding; watch pricing as you scale.
review.best_for: Consumer dApps onboarding non-crypto users with embedded wallets
review.not_for: Cost-sensitive projects with millions of wallet MAUs

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: No explicit peak-lock evidence; default FALSE per rules.
